query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('performance_score', 'total_assessments_completed', 'accuracy_score', 'avg_completion_time', 'assessor_tier', 'role');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('performance_score', 'total_assessments_completed', 'accuracy_score', 'avg_completion_time', 'assessor_tier', 'role');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
role	enum
assessor_tier	enum
performance_score	int
total_assessments_completed	int
accuracy_score	decimal
avg_completion_time	decimal
